title: Be in it to win a guaranteed R90 million powerball jackpot this friday – get your ticket now!
description: BUSINESS NEWS - This jackpot has launched...
bodyText:
Sponsored Content

BUSINESS NEWS - This jackpot has launched South Africa into a frenzy of excitement, following the last PowerBall winner who won the R70m Guaranteed jackpot in May 2024.


> In July another jackpot of over R59m was won by a lucky participant hailing from KwaZulu-Natal, who had opted for a Quick Pick selection via his banking APP.


While a married couple, also residing in the Kwa-Zulu Natal province recently claimed their (over) R16m Powerball Plus winnings in August, after checking their winning ticket at a local retail store. They encouraged other South Africans to play, saying “If you don’t put bait into the water, you cannot expect to catch any fish.”

Charmaine Mabuza, CEO of ITHUBA echoed the PowerBall Plus winner’s sentiments, saying, “We are excited to announce yet another potentially life-changing guaranteed jackpot and as we often say at ITHUBA, you have to be in it to (stand a chance to) win it. We wait in anticipation for this Friday’s draw which will hopefully create yet another new multi-millionaire.”

Will you be next? You could become a multi-millionaire, when you buy your tickets now at your nearest participating retailer, on our website by visiting nationallottery.co.za using your computer or mobile web, via the National Lottery Mobile App, or participating banks namely FNB, ABSA, Nedbank, Standard Bank, Capitec, TymeBank, Old Mutual and African Bank otherwise simply dial *120*7529# for USSD.

Winners who receive winnings of R50 000 and above receive free trauma counselling from professional psychologists, and financial advice from accredited financial advisors at no cost to our winners.

- All National Lottery winnings are tax-free.
- Players must be 18 years or older to play. Play responsibly.

ITHUBA is the proud operator of the National Lottery.

About ITHUBA   ITHUBA Holdings Proprietary “(RF), is the official operator of the National Lottery in South Africa. Since taking over the operation of the National Lottery in 2015,  ITHUBA has been living up to its objective to reinvigorate the National Lottery by optimizing the consumer experience, restoring faith and trust in the National Lottery; as well as showcasing its positive social contribution to society. ITHUBA, proudly rooted in South Africa, is intent on contributing positively and actively to socio-economic development by producing as many millionaires as possible, as well as uplifting communities through various initiatives.

ITHUBA is determined to uphold the ethical and efficient operation of the National Lottery, setting the benchmark for Lottery operations in South Africa and beyond.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
